prompt: Photorealistic candid portrait of a young East Asian schoolgirl standing in a staff room or school locker room. She has long, straight black hair with neat full bangs, large expressive dark brown eyes, and a soft youthful appearance. She wears a beige face mask covering her nose and mouth, a crisp white short-sleeve button-up school shirt, a large blue ribbon bow tie, and a blue plaid pleated skirt. A navy-blue school bag hangs from her shoulder, decorated with multiple cute pastel pink plush character keychains and accessories. She is slightly leaning forward toward the camera with a shy, friendly pose, making direct eye contact. Background features open gray lockers, a hanging green uniform shirt, a wall mirror reflecting part of the room, beige walls, and fluorescent indoor lighting. Realistic Japanese school environment, natural colors, high detail, authentic textures, soft ambient light, shallow depth of field, documentary-style photography, vertical composition, ultra-realistic, 35mm lens, candid snapshot aesthetic.
